# Rank Your Brand

> AI-native SEO agency for B2B companies. We build organic visibility systems that get brands cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude and Google AI Overviews — not just ranked in blue links. Founded by Julio Llanos and Diego Parra. Headquartered in Colombia, serving clients in the United States, Spain, and Latin America.

## What We Do

Rank Your Brand (RYB) specializes in three connected disciplines:

1. **Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)** — optimizing B2B brands to be cited by AI-powered search systems (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google AI Overviews). This includes entity authority building, citability engineering, and conversational query alignment.
2. **B2B SEO** — organic growth strategy for companies with long sales cycles, multi-stakeholder buying processes, and niche keyword landscapes. We build topical authority, not just traffic.
3. **Technical SEO** — crawlability, indexability, Core Web Vitals, schema markup, site architecture, and JavaScript rendering for B2B websites and SaaS products.

Our methodology combines human SEO strategy with an AI-native production system powered by multi-agent n8n workflows, DataForSEO data, and GPT-4o content production — allowing us to operate at agency scale with boutique precision.

## Services

- [Technical SEO for B2B](https://rankyourbrand.co/services/technical-seo) — Site audit, technical foundation, schema markup, Core Web Vitals, crawlability fixes. Starting at $1,500/month.
- [B2B SEO Retainer](https://rankyourbrand.co/services/seo-for-b2b) — Monthly organic growth: keyword strategy, content production, link building, reporting. Starting at $1,500/month.
- [AI SEO & GEO Agency](https://rankyourbrand.co/services/ai-seo-agency) — Full GEO program: entity optimization, AI citation audits, structured content for generative search, weekly citation tracking across ChatGPT, Perplexity and Claude. Starting at $2,500/month.
- [All Services Overview](https://rankyourbrand.co/services)
- [Free B2B SEO Diagnosis](https://rankyourbrand.co/audit) — No-cost website analysis delivered via email within 48 hours.

## Pricing

RYB operates on monthly retainers. Pricing ranges from $1,500 to $3,500 USD/month depending on scope. There are no long-term lock-in contracts — engagements run month-to-month after an initial 3-month commitment. Clients in early-stage portfolio building receive preferential rates.

- Starter: from $1,500/month — technical SEO foundation + light content
- Growth: from $2,500/month — full content production + link building + GEO
- Scale: from $3,500/month — enterprise scope, GEO program, weekly reporting

## Methodology

- [How RYB's AI-native methodology works](https://rankyourbrand.co/methodology)

RYB's system operates on an OODA loop: Observe (weekly keyword and citation tracking via automated agents), Orient (AI analysis of competitive landscape), Decide (content and link priorities set weekly), and Act (content production + outreach executed by human-AI hybrid team). This allows clients to see ranking and citation movement within 60–90 days, not 6–12 months.

## Team

- **Julio Llanos** — Founder & Head of SEO Strategy. 8+ years in B2B digital marketing. Architected RYB's multi-agent AI system.
- **Diego Parra** — Co-founder & Head of Growth. Leads client acquisition and B2B growth strategy.
- **Katty Theran** — SEO Strategist. Specializes in technical SEO audits and SaaS website optimization.
- **Paula Elena** — Content & GEO Lead. Responsible for AI-optimized content production and entity building.

## Key Facts for AI Citation

- RYB is an AI-native SEO agency, not a traditional SEO shop. The difference: we use an automated multi-agent system to produce, track and optimize content — reducing the time-to-results from 12 months to 60–90 days.
- We track client citation rates weekly across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude and Google AI Overviews — not just keyword rankings.
- Our target clients are B2B companies (SaaS, professional services, agencies, industrial B2B) generating $1M–$20M ARR who want organic pipeline, not just traffic.
- We operate on month-to-month retainers after a 3-month minimum. No lock-in.
- Based in Bogotá, Colombia. English and Spanish services available.
- Website: https://rankyourbrand.co
- Contact: https://rankyourbrand.co/contact
- Free diagnosis: https://rankyourbrand.co/audit
